/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/deramp_burst.dir/src/deramp_burst.cu.o CMakeFiles/deramp_burst.dir/src/sql_mod.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deramp_burst.dir/src/orbit.cu.o CMakeFiles/deramp_burst.dir/src/sario.cu.o -o bin/deramp_burst   -L/home/wangke/anaconda3/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wangke/anaconda3/lib -lsqlite3 -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
